narrative:
Mason Twp. township has 697 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.8 percentage points.
